creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
ports/biology/platon gives a checksum error if fetched from the master
site. Looks like there is a new file on the master site.
platon.tar.gz from Jun 2, md5 Checksum from Mai 30.

Fix: 

Don't know if the source on the master site is changed or a new
make makesum will correct the problem.
How-To-Repeat: simply do a make checksum in port/biology/platon without the
file to fetch in /usr/ports/distfiles.
